title: HarnessSphere — Harness → Tools → Gateway/API → Processes → Container → Host
description: Layered, vendor-neutral view. gen_ai/http panels need an AI/gateway source; messages/sessions/tool.calls, endpoint up/latency, process.*, container.* (cgroup v2) and Host system.* are emitted by the watcher's collectors. Re-import is fresh (panel IDs regenerate).

widgets.title: OpenClaw gateway (Prometheus scrape)
widgets.description: Curated scrape of OpenClaw's /api/diagnostics/prometheus: GenAI -> gen_ai.* (Harness row above); the rest -> harnesssphere.openclaw.*.
